zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Emmely於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾姆利時，她的父親Thomas FitzWilliam20歲，母親Agnes de Bertram18歲。她於1215年與Roger Bertram I在英國英格蘭諾福爾可米特福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1253年8月20日在英國諾圖波藍德米特福德享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Emmely于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰越可爾艾姆利时，她的父亲Thomas FitzWilliam20岁，母亲Agnes de Bertram18岁。她于1215年与Roger Bertram I在英国英格兰諾福爾可米特福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1253年8月20日在英国諾圖波藍德米特福德享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emmely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names beginning with the element amal ‘capable, brave, eager’.
habitational name from either of two places so named near Trier.

variants.name: Emele
meanings: South German and Swiss German: variant of   Emmel   1.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Emmely was born about 1210, in Emley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas FitzWilliam, was 20 and her mother, Agnes de Bertram, was 18. She married Roger Bertram I in 1215, in Mitford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 August 1253, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes d’Emmely est née environ 1210, à Emley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas FitzWilliam, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Bertram, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Bertram I en 1215, à Mitford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 août 1253, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Emmely um 1210 in Emley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas FitzWilliam 20 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Bertram 18. Sie hat 1215 in Mitford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Roger Bertram I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. August 1253 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Mitford, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Emmely è nata il circa 1210 nel Emley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas FitzWilliam, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Bertram, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Roger Bertram I nel 1215, nel Mitford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 agosto 1253, nel Mitford, Northumberland, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Emmelyが約1210年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエムリーで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzWilliamは20歳，母Agnes de Bertramは18歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクミトフォードでRoger Bertram Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1253年8月20日にイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Emmely(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas FitzWilliam(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Bertram(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 미트퍼드에서 Roger Bertram I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1253년 8월 20일 영국 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Emmely nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas FitzWilliam, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Bertram, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Bertram I em 1215, em Mitford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1253, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Emmely родилась около 1210 г. в местности эмли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas FitzWilliam было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Bertram, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Bertram I в 1215 г. в местности митфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 августа 1253 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Emmely nació aproximadamente 1210, en Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas FitzWilliam, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes de Bertram, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Roger Bertram I en 1215, en Mitford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1253, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
